---# Neuro360Q TechnoCommercial

**Client:** Dr. Sweta Adatia / Neuro360Q
**Status:** draft  ·  **Created:** 2026-05-14

---

{
  "rawHtml": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<title>Neuro360Q — TechnoCommercial Proposal BTR-2026-NS-04</title>\n<style>\n  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }\n  body { font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif; background:#d0d0d0; }\n  :root {\n    --navy:#1C2B4A; --gold:#C9A93F; --text:#374151;\n    --muted:#6B7280; --border:#E5E7EB; --bg:#F8F9FB;\n  }\n  .page {\n    width:210mm; height:297mm; overflow:hidden;\n    margin:10px auto; background:white;\n    display:flex; flex-direction:column;\n    box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.15);\n  }\n  @media print {\n    body { background:white; }\n    .page { margin:0; box-shadow:none; page-break-after:always; }\n    .page:last-child { page-break-after:avoid; }\n    @page { size:A4; margin:0; }\n  }\n  /* COVER */\n  .cover {\n    background:var(--navy); flex:1;\n    display:flex; flex-direction:column;\n    justify-content:flex-end; padding:42px 44px 0 44px;\n    position:relative;\n  }\n  .cover-accent { width:48px; height:3px; background:var(--gold); margin-bottom:22px; }\n  .cover-label { font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px; }\n  .cover-title { font-size:28px; font-weight:800; color:#fff; line-height:1.18; margin-bottom:10px; }\n  .cover-subtitle { font-size:11.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.65); margin-bottom:28px; line-height:1.5; }\n  .cover-meta { display:flex; gap:0; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15); margin-top:auto; }\n  .cover-meta-col { flex:1; padding:16px 0 20px; border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); padding-right:16px; padding-left:16px; }\n  .cover-meta-col:first-child { padding-left:0; }\n  .cover-meta-col:last-child { border-right:none; }\n  .cover-meta-label { font-size:7.5px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:1.8px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:5px; }\n  .cover-meta-name { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#fff; margin-bottom:2px; }\n  .cover-meta-sub { font-size:9px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.6); line-height:1.5; }\n  /* PAGE FOOTER */\n  .page-footer { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:7px 24px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); background:#fff; font-size:7.5px; color:var(--muted); flex-shrink:0; }\n  /* INNER PAGES */\n  .inner { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; padding:28px 28px 0 28px; overflow:hidden; }\n  .section-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; background:var(--navy); color:#fff; font-size:7.5px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:3px; margin-bottom:8px; }\n  .section-title { font-size:15px; font-weight:800; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:10px; }\n  .section-divider { height:2px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),transparent); margin-bottom:14px; }\n  .body-text { font-size:9px; color:var(--text); line-height:1.65; }\n  /* DELIVERABLES */\n  .deliverables { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; }\n  .deliv-item { display:flex; gap:10px; padding:7px 10px; background:var(--bg); border-left:3px solid var(--gold); border-radius:0 4px 4px 0; }\n  .deliv-num { font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:var(--gold); min-width:18px; padding-top:1px; }\n  .deliv-body { flex:1; }\n  .deliv-title { font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:1px; }\n  .deliv-desc { font-size:8px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.45; }\n  .deliv-badge { display:inline-block; font-size:6.5px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold); background:rgba(201,169,63,.12); border:1px solid rgba(201,169,63,.3); padding:1px 5px; border-radius:2px; margin-left:5px; letter-spacing:.5px; }\n  /* CARDS GRID */\n  .cards-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:8px; }\n  .card { background:var(--bg); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:6px; padding:10px 11px; }\n  .card-icon { font-size:13px; margin-bottom:5px; }\n  .card-title { font-size:8.5px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:3px; }\n  .card-desc { font-size:7.5px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.5; }\n  /* 2-col cards */\n  .cards-2col { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; }\n  /* TIMELINE */\n  .timeline { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0; }\n  .tl-row { display:flex; gap:14px; position:relative; }\n  .tl-row::before { content:''; position:absolute; left:7px; top:18px; bottom:-8px; width:2px; background:var(--border); z-index:0; }\n  .tl-row:last-child::before { display:none; }\n  .tl-dot { width:16px; height:16px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold); flex-shrink:0; margin-top:2px; z-index:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }\n  .tl-dot-inner { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:#fff; }\n  .tl-content { flex:1; padding-bottom:12px; }\n  .tl-phase { font-size:7.5px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; }\n  .tl-title { font-size:9.5px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin:1px 0; }\n  .tl-tasks { font-size:8px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.5; }\n  /* PRICING */\n  .pricing-table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:8.5px; }\n  .pricing-table th { background:var(--navy); color:#fff; padding:7px 10px; text-align:left; font-size:7.5px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.8px; text-transform:uppercase; }\n  .pricing-table td { padding:7px 10px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text); }\n  .pricing-table tr.subtotal td { background:var(--bg); font-weight:700; }\n  .pricing-table tr.total td { background:var(--navy); color:#fff; font-weight:800; font-size:10px; }\n  .pricing-table tr.total td:last-child { color:var(--gold); }\n  .payment-cards { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; margin-top:10px; }\n  .pay-card { border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:6px; padding:10px 12px; }\n  .pay-phase { font-size:7px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:3px; }\n  .pay-amount { font-size:15px; font-weight:800; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:1px; }\n  .pay-inr { font-size:8px; color:var(--muted); }\n  .pay-trigger { font-size:7.5px; color:var(--muted); margin-top:3px; }\n  /* TERMS */\n  .terms-list { list-style:none; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; }\n  .terms-list li { font-size:8px; color:var(--text); line-height:1.55; padding-left:12px; position:relative; }\n  .terms-list li::before { content:'—'; position:absolute; left:0; color:var(--gold); font-weight:700; }\n  /* SIGNATURE */\n  .sig-block { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:20px; margin-top:12px; }\n  .sig-line { border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--navy); margin:28px 0 5px; }\n  .sig-name { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); }\n  .sig-title { font-size:7.5px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.5; }\n  /* FOOTER BAND */\n  .footer-band { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; background:var(--navy); padding:12px 24px; flex-shrink:0; }\n  .footer-left .f-email { font-size:7.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.55); margin-top:2px; }\n  .footer-center { font-size:7.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.5); text-align:center; line-height:1.5; }\n  .footer-right { text-align:right; }\n  .footer-right .f-client { font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#fff; }\n  .footer-right .f-address { font-size:7.5px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.55); margin-top:2px; }\n  .footer-confidential { background:#111; color:rgba(255,255,255,.4); font-size:7px; text-align:center; padding:4px; letter-spacing:.5px; flex-shrink:0; }\n  .two-col { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:14px; }\n  .spacer { height:10px; }\n  .small-spacer { height:6px; }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<!-- PAGE 1: COVER -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"cover\">\n    <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\"\n         style=\"width:44px;height:44px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:20px;display:block;\">\n    <div class=\"cover-accent\"></div>\n    <div class=\"cover-label\">Techno-Commercial Proposal</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-title\">Neuro360Q<br>qEEG Clinical Diagnostic<br>Reporting Platform</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-subtitle\">Standalone Platform Build — Fixed-Price Engagement</div>\n    <div class=\"cover-meta\">\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Prepared By</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">Biji Thomas</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">CEO &amp; Principal Consultant<br>Bettroi FZE, Dubai<br>admin@bettroi.com</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Prepared For</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">Dr. Shweta Nair</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">Founder &amp; Clinical Director<br>Neurosense360 / Limitless Brain Lab<br>Bangalore, India</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Reference</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">BTR-2026-NS-04</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">Date: 20 April 2026<br>Valid: 60 Days<br>Currency: AED / INR</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"cover-meta-col\">\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-label\">Project Value</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-name\">AED 4,500</div>\n        <div class=\"cover-meta-sub\">INR 1,12,500<br>Timeline: 3 Weeks<br>Fixed-Price</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-04 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Confidential &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 1 of 5</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- PAGE 2: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY + SCOPE -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"inner\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">01 &nbsp; Executive Summary</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Clinical-Grade qEEG Reporting for Neuro360Q</div>\n    <div class=\"section-divider\"></div>\n    <div class=\"body-text\">\n      Neuro360Q is a purpose-built standalone platform that transforms raw EEG recordings (EDF/EDF+ format) into structured, clinician-ready neurological reports. The platform integrates a signal pre-processing pipeline, topographic coherence mapping, a Probability &amp; Neuro-Diagnostic Assessment (PNDA) module covering five neuro-psychiatric conditions, and an AI Biomarker Engine trained on published qEEG literature. The Neuro360Q Reporting Portal delivers branded PDF reports to clinicians within a secure web-based dashboard. Deliverables D1 and D2 are adapted from the already-implemented LimitlessBrainCare pipeline, reducing build effort and risk. The total fixed-price engagement is AED 4,500 completed across 3 weeks.\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"spacer\"></div>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">02 &nbsp; Scope of Work</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Six Deliverables — Fixed Scope</div>\n    <div class=\"section-divider\"></div>\n    <div class=\"deliverables\">\n      <div class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"deliv-num\">D1</div>\n        <div class=\"deliv-body\">\n          <div class=\"deliv-title\">EDF Ingestion Pipeline <span class=\"deliv-badge\">CLONED-LBL</span></div>\n          <div class=\"deliv-desc\">Secure upload and parsing of EDF/EDF+ files. Channel mapping, sampling rate normalisation, metadata extraction. Supabase storage integration with pre-signed access controls.</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"deliv-num\">D2</div>\n        <div class=\"deliv-body\">\n          <div class=\"deliv-title\">Signal Pre-processing &amp; Feature Extraction <span class=\"deliv-badge\">CLONED-LBL</span></div>\n          <div class=\"deliv-desc\">Band-power computation (delta, theta, alpha, beta, gamma), peak alpha frequency (PAF), theta/alpha ratio (TAR), ICA-based artefact rejection via MNE-Python microservice.</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"deliv-num\">D3</div>\n        <div class=\"deliv-body\">\n          <div class=\"deliv-title\">Topographic Mapping &amp; Coherence Engine</div>\n          <div class=\"deliv-desc\">Scalp heatmaps generated per band using interpolation. Inter-hemispheric and intra-hemispheric coherence matrices. Rendered as SVG for embedding in reports.</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"deliv-num\">D4</div>\n        <div class=\"deliv-body\">\n          <div class=\"deliv-title\">Probability &amp; Neuro-Diagnostic Assessment (PNDA)</div>\n          <div class=\"deliv-desc\">Two-stage model: Stage 1 — literature-anchored biomarker maps (Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, Schizophrenia, MDD, Anxiety Disorder). Stage 2 — supervised ML (XGBoost + Platt scaling) on labelled EDF data. Output: High / Moderate / Low probability bands per condition.</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"deliv-num\">D5</div>\n        <div class=\"deliv-body\">\n          <div class=\"deliv-title\">AI Biomarker Engine</div>\n          <div class=\"deliv-desc\">PubMed/IEEE literature-anchored feature weighting. Continuous retraining pipeline as labelled data accumulates. Explainability layer (SHAP values) surfaced in clinician view.</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"deliv-item\">\n        <div class=\"deliv-num\">D6</div>\n        <div class=\"deliv-body\">\n          <div class=\"deliv-title\">Neuro360Q Reporting Portal</div>\n          <div class=\"deliv-desc\">React web dashboard — patient upload, report queue, PNDA results view, branded PDF export. Role-based access: Admin, Clinician, Viewer. Deployed on Vercel + Supabase backend.</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-04 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Confidential &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 2 of 5</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- PAGE 3: TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE + PLATFORM DETAILS -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"inner\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">03 &nbsp; Technical Architecture</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Platform Components &amp; Data Flow</div>\n    <div class=\"section-divider\"></div>\n    <div class=\"cards-grid\">\n      <div class=\"card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">EDF Ingestion Layer</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Python FastAPI microservice. Parses EDF/EDF+ headers, validates channel montage, streams binary data to Supabase Storage with AES-256 at rest.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Signal Processing Engine</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">MNE-Python. Band-pass filtering (1–50 Hz), independent component analysis (ICA), power spectral density (PSD) via Welch method, epoch rejection.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Topographic Renderer</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Spherical spline interpolation for scalp maps. Coherence computed via cross-spectral density. Output: SVG heatmaps embedded directly in PDF reports.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">PNDA Module</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">XGBoost classifier with Platt scaling. Feature set: 47 qEEG markers per 19-channel montage. Probability outputs per condition with confidence intervals.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">AI Biomarker Engine</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">Literature-anchored priors from PubMed meta-analyses. SHAP explainability for each biomarker contribution. Retraining triggered on 50+ new labelled samples.</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"card\">\n        <div class=\"card-title\">Reporting Portal</div>\n        <div class=\"card-desc\">React + Next.js, Supabase Auth. Patient registry, EDF queue, PNDA dashboard. PDF export via Puppeteer with Neuro360Q clinical branding.</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-04 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Confidential &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 3 of 5</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- PAGE 4: TIMELINE + COMMERCIALS -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"inner\">\n    <div class=\"two-col\">\n      <div>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\">04 &nbsp; Delivery Timeline</div>\n        <div class=\"section-title\">3-Week Build Plan</div>\n        <div class=\"section-divider\"></div>\n        <div class=\"timeline\">\n          <div class=\"tl-row\">\n            <div class=\"tl-dot\"><div class=\"tl-dot-inner\"></div></div>\n            <div class=\"tl-content\">\n              <div class=\"tl-phase\">Week 1 &nbsp;· Days 1–5</div>\n              <div class=\"tl-title\">Foundation &amp; Pipeline</div>\n              <div class=\"tl-tasks\">Clone EDF ingestion pipeline from LBL codebase. Adapt for Neuro360Q patient schema. Signal pre-processing microservice integration. Supabase schema for Neuro360Q patients, EDF files, report queue.</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"tl-row\">\n            <div class=\"tl-dot\"><div class=\"tl-dot-inner\"></div></div>\n            <div class=\"tl-content\">\n              <div class=\"tl-phase\">Week 2 &nbsp;· Days 6–10</div>\n              <div class=\"tl-title\">PNDA, AI Engine &amp; Topo Maps</div>\n              <div class=\"tl-tasks\">Literature-anchored biomarker library (Stage 1 PNDA). XGBoost training pipeline on labelled EDF data. Topographic SVG renderer. Coherence matrix engine. SHAP explainability layer.</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"tl-row\">\n            <div class=\"tl-dot\"><div class=\"tl-dot-inner\"></div></div>\n            <div class=\"tl-content\">\n              <div class=\"tl-phase\">Week 3 &nbsp;· Days 11–15</div>\n              <div class=\"tl-title\">Portal, Reports &amp; Deployment</div>\n              <div class=\"tl-tasks\">React Neuro360Q portal build. PNDA dashboard, report queue, PDF export. Role-based auth. UAT with clinical team. Production deployment — Vercel + Supabase.</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div>\n        <div class=\"section-badge\">05 &nbsp; Commercial Terms</div>\n        <div class=\"section-title\">Fixed-Price Engagement</div>\n        <div class=\"section-divider\"></div>\n        <table class=\"pricing-table\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr>\n              <th>Item</th>\n              <th>Duration</th>\n              <th style=\"text-align:right\">AED</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            <tr>\n              <td>EDF Ingestion &amp; Signal Processing (D1–D2)</td>\n              <td>Cloned-LBL</td>\n              <td style=\"text-align:right\">—</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr>\n              <td>Topo Mapping &amp; Coherence Engine (D3)</td>\n              <td>5 Days</td>\n              <td style=\"text-align:right\">1,500</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr>\n              <td>Neuro360Q Portal &amp; Deployment (D6)</td>\n              <td>3 Days</td>\n              <td style=\"text-align:right\">900</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr class=\"subtotal\">\n              <td colspan=\"2\">Platform Build Total</td>\n              <td style=\"text-align:right\">4,500</td>\n            </tr>\n            <tr class=\"total\">\n              <td colspan=\"2\">TOTAL (Fixed Price)</td>\n              <td style=\"text-align:right\">AED 4,500</td>\n            </tr>\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n        <div style=\"font-size:7.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;\">INR equivalent: &#8377;1,12,500 &nbsp;(INR 25 = AED 1)</div>\n\n        <div class=\"payment-cards\">\n          <div class=\"pay-card\">\n            <div class=\"pay-phase\">Milestone 1 — Initiation</div>\n            <div class=\"pay-amount\">AED 2,250</div>\n            <div class=\"pay-inr\">INR 56,250</div>\n            <div class=\"pay-trigger\">Due upon contract execution</div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"pay-card\">\n            <div class=\"pay-phase\">Milestone 2 — Final Delivery</div>\n            <div class=\"pay-amount\">AED 2,250</div>\n            <div class=\"pay-inr\">INR 56,250</div>\n            <div class=\"pay-trigger\">Due on production deployment</div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div style=\"margin-top:10px;background:var(--bg);border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:8px 10px;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;\">\n          <div style=\"font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:3px;\">Infrastructure Costs (Client Account)</div>\n          <div style=\"font-size:7.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;\">Supabase Pro (~AED 90/month), Vercel (~AED 75/month), and LLM API tokens billed directly to client accounts. Not included in project fee.</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <div class=\"pf-left\">BTR-2026-NS-04 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Confidential &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE</div>\n    <div class=\"pf-right\">Page 4 of 5</div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- PAGE 5: TERMS + SIGNATURE + FOOTER -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"inner\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\">06 &nbsp; Terms &amp; Conditions</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Engagement Terms</div>\n    <div class=\"section-divider\"></div>\n    <ul class=\"terms-list\">\n      <li><strong>Fixed Scope.</strong> This proposal covers the six deliverables listed in Section 02 only. Any additions or scope changes require a written change order and may affect the timeline and fee.</li>\n      <li><strong>Labelled Data Prerequisite.</strong> Stage 2 PNDA training requires a minimum of 100 labelled EDF recordings. Delay in providing data will extend the timeline proportionally.</li>\n      <li><strong>Payment.</strong> Milestone 1 (50%) due on contract execution. Milestone 2 (50%) due on production deployment and handover. All invoices payable within 7 business days of issue.</li>\n      <li><strong>Intellectual Property.</strong> All custom code, models, and documentation created under this engagement vest in the client upon receipt of final payment. Bettroi retains rights to generic reusable frameworks and methodology.</li>\n      <li><strong>Clinical Disclaimer.</strong> PNDA outputs are clinical decision-support tools, not autonomous diagnostic conclusions. Bettroi bears no clinical liability for downstream medical decisions.</li>\n      <li><strong>Warranty.</strong> Bettroi warrants a 30-day defect-correction period post go-live covering bugs in delivered code. Infrastructure, third-party API changes, and data drift are excluded.</li>\n      <li><strong>Confidentiality.</strong> Both parties agree to keep all proposal details, patient data, and technical artefacts strictly confidential. This document is prepared exclusively for Neurosense360 and is not for circulation.</li>\n      <li><strong>Governing Law.</strong> This engagement is governed by the laws of the UAE (DTEC jurisdiction). Any disputes to be resolved by mutual negotiation before arbitration.</li>\n      <li><strong>Validity.</strong> This proposal is valid for 60 days from the date of issue (20 April 2026).</li>\n    </ul>\n\n    <div class=\"sig-block\" style=\"margin-top:14px;\">\n      <div>\n        <div style=\"font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;\">For Bettroi FZE</div>\n        <div class=\"sig-line\"></div>\n        <div class=\"sig-name\">Biji Thomas</div>\n        <div class=\"sig-title\">CEO &amp; Principal Consultant &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Bettroi FZE<br>DTEC-51432 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Dubai Silicon Oasis, UAE</div>\n      </div>\n      <div>\n        <div style=\"font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;\">For Neurosense360</div>\n        <div class=\"sig-line\"></div>\n        <div class=\"sig-name\">Dr. Shweta Nair</div>\n        <div class=\"sig-title\">Founder &amp; Clinical Director<br>Neurosense360 / Limitless Brain Lab, Bangalore</div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <div class=\"footer-band\">\n    <div class=\"footer-left\">\n      <div class=\"f-name\">\n        <img src=\"data:image/png;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;\">\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"f-email\">admin@bettroi.com &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; bettroi.com &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; +971 54 714 8580</div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"footer-center\">A5, Techno-Hub, DTEC<br>Dubai Silicon Oasis, UAE</div>\n    <div class=\"footer-right\">\n      <div class=\"f-client\">Neurosense360 — Dr. Shweta Nair</div>\n      <div class=\"f-address\">Ref: BTR-2026-NS-04 &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; 20 April 2026</div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"footer-confidential\">Confidential — Prepared exclusively for Neurosense360 / Limitless Brain Lab — Not for circulation</div>\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n",
  "isImported": true,
  "sourceFile": "Neuro360Q_TechnoCommercial_BTR-2026-NS-04.html"
}
